feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SBO_SP_PostTransactionNotice updates item's price but not detected by B1IF
entry.content:
Hi dear community members,


I have a question related to SAP B1 more technically:
While clients adding A/P invoice, they set sales price in the user defined field per item. After adding document my SBO_SP_PostTransactionNotice updates these items' price in the exact pricelist. I want to know what is the difference between this case and manual price change? Because SAP Customer Checkout has items synchronization job, it uses sap.POS.FetchMaterialList scenario in B1IF and 1st case it does not detect item's price changed, but if we change price manually  it detects. Which field of ITM1 I should update in procedure in order to be detected by B1IF?

Here is my procedure:

IF :object_type in ('18') AND (:transaction_type = 'A' OR :transaction_type = 'U') THEN

UPDATE "ITM1" T0
SET
"Price" = (
SELECT MAX(P."U_newPriceUZS")
FROM "PCH1" P
WHERE
P."ItemCode" = T0."ItemCode"
AND P."DocEntry" IN ( :list_of_cols_val_tab_del )
),
"Currency" = 'UZS'
WHERE
T0."PriceList" = '5'
AND EXISTS (
SELECT 1
FROM "PCH1" P
WHERE
P."ItemCode" = T0."ItemCode"
AND P."DocEntry" IN ( :list_of_cols_val_tab_del )
);

END IF;

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA SAP Customer Checkout 

@Darius @elena_vavitsa @bikash_bansal

entry.title: SAP B1 10.0 Multi-branch Balance Sheets?
entry.content: Is it possible to generate a separate balance sheet for each branch in SAP B1 10.0 in addition to a consolidated balance sheet?

entry.title: The requested lookup key was not found in any active activation context
entry.content:
hi all, When I import addon into sap for startup, it prompts me that the requested lookup key was not found in any active activation context.
My sap b1 version number is 10.00.250, .net framework4.8
So I want to know, is this problem a problem with my addon code or Settings, or is it a Windows problem? I have checked relevant materials and some say it's a problem caused by Windows.
The following is my code. Please help analyze it
class Program

  class Program
    {
        public static SAPbouiCOM.Application SBO_Application;
        public static SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany;
        public static string SelectedItemCode = ""; 
        /// <summary>
        /// The main entry point for the application.
        /// </summary>
        [STAThread]
        static void Main(string[] args)
        {
            try
            {
                SAPbouiCOM.SboGuiApi sboGuiApi = new SAPbouiCOM.SboGuiApi();
                string sConnectionString = args.Length > 0 ? args[0] : Environment.GetCommandLineArgs()[1];
                sboGuiApi.Connect(sConnectionString);
                SBO_Application = sboGuiApi.GetApplication(-1);             
                oCompany = (SAPbobsCOM.Company)SBO_Application.Company.GetDICompany();
                if (oCompany.Connected)
                {
                    SBO_Application.StatusBar.SetText("Connection successful! DI Company is ready", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Success);
                }
                else
                {
                    SBO_Application.StatusBar.SetText("Connection failed. Please check the connection information", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Error);
                    return;
                }
                Application oApp = null;
                if (args.Length < 1)
                {
                    oApp = new Application();
                }
                else
                {
                    //If you want to use an add-on identifier for the development license, you can specify an add-on identifier string as the second parameter.
                    //oApp = new Application(args[0], "XXXXX");
                    oApp = new Application(args[0]);
                }
                Menu MyMenu = new Menu();               
                MyMenu.AddMenuItems();
                oApp.RegisterMenuEventHandler(MyMenu.SBO_Application_MenuEvent);
                Application.SBO_Application.AppEvent += new SAPbouiCOM._IApplicationEvents_AppEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_AppEvent);
                setAttribute setA = new setAttribute(SBO_Application, oCompany);
                setA.Initialize();
                oApp.Run();
                
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox.Show(ex.Message);
            }
        }

        

        static void SBO_Application_AppEvent(SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes EventType)
        {
            switch (EventType)
            {
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_ShutDown:
                    //Exit Add-On
                    System.Windows.Forms.Application.Exit();
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_CompanyChanged:
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_FontChanged:
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_LanguageChanged:
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_ServerTerminition:
                    break;
                default:
                    break;
            }
        }
    }

  class setAttribute

 

 

private Application SBO_Application;
        private SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany; 
        string openProDocentry = "";
        public setAttribute(SAPbouiCOM.Application app, SAPbobsCOM.Company company)
        {
            this.SBO_Application = app;
            this.oCompany = company;
        }
        public void Initialize()
        {            
            SBO_Application.AppEvent += new _IApplicationEvents_AppEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_AppEvent);
            SBO_Application.ItemEvent += new _IApplicationEvents_ItemEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_ItemEvent);
            SBO_Application.MenuEvent += new _IApplicationEvents_MenuEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_MenuEvent);
            SBO_Application.MessageBox("Event registration completed and connection successful!");
        }

When I activate addon, it will prompt "Connection successful!" DI Company is ready
then is

entry.title: The requested lookup key was not found in any active activation context
entry.content:
hi all, When I import addon into sap for startup, it prompts me that the requested lookup key was not found in any active activation context.
My sap b1 version number is 10.00.250, .net framework4.8
So I want to know, is this problem a problem with my addon code or Settings, or is it a Windows problem? I have checked relevant materials and some say it's a problem caused by Windows.
The following is my code. Please help analyze it

class Program


class Program
    {
        public static SAPbouiCOM.Application SBO_Application;
        public static SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany;
        public static string SelectedItemCode = ""; 
        /// <summary>
        /// The main entry point for the application.
        /// </summary>
        [STAThread]
        static void Main(string[] args)
        {
            try
            {
                SAPbouiCOM.SboGuiApi sboGuiApi = new SAPbouiCOM.SboGuiApi();
                string sConnectionString = args.Length > 0 ? args[0] : Environment.GetCommandLineArgs()[1];
                sboGuiApi.Connect(sConnectionString);
                SBO_Application = sboGuiApi.GetApplication(-1);             
                oCompany = (SAPbobsCOM.Company)SBO_Application.Company.GetDICompany();
                if (oCompany.Connected)
                {
                    SBO_Application.StatusBar.SetText("Connection successful! DI Company is ready", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Success);
                }
                else
                {
                    SBO_Application.StatusBar.SetText("Connection failed. Please check the connection information", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Error);
                    return;
                }
                Application oApp = null;
                if (args.Length < 1)
                {
                    oApp = new Application();
                }
                else
                {
                    //If you want to use an add-on identifier for the development license, you can specify an add-on identifier string as the second parameter.
                    //oApp = new Application(args[0], "XXXXX");
                    oApp = new Application(args[0]);
                }
                Menu MyMenu = new Menu();               
                MyMenu.AddMenuItems();
                oApp.RegisterMenuEventHandler(MyMenu.SBO_Application_MenuEvent);
                Application.SBO_Application.AppEvent += new SAPbouiCOM._IApplicationEvents_AppEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_AppEvent);
                setAttribute setA = new setAttribute(SBO_Application, oCompany);
                setA.Initialize();
                oApp.Run();
                
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox.Show(ex.Message);
            }
        }

        

        static void SBO_Application_AppEvent(SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes EventType)
        {
            switch (EventType)
            {
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_ShutDown:
                    //Exit Add-On
                    System.Windows.Forms.Application.Exit();
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_CompanyChanged:
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_FontChanged:
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_LanguageChanged:
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_ServerTerminition:
                    break;
                default:
                    break;
            }
        }
    }

class setAttribute

 

private Application SBO_Application;
        private SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany; 
        string openProDocentry = "";
        public setAttribute(SAPbouiCOM.Application app, SAPbobsCOM.Company company)
        {
            this.SBO_Application = app;
            this.oCompany = company;
        }
        public void Initialize()
        {            
            SBO_Application.AppEvent += new _IApplicationEvents_AppEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_AppEvent);
            SBO_Application.ItemEvent += new _IApplicationEvents_ItemEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_ItemEvent);
            SBO_Application.MenuEvent += new _IApplicationEvents_MenuEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_MenuEvent);
            SBO_Application.MessageBox("Event registration completed and connection successful!");
        }


When I activate addon, it will prompt "Connection successful!" DI Company is ready
then is

entry.title: Multiple Item Valuation Method used into Items SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear Team,

In company settings, Moving average valuation method is setup. Users are using Item master with different valuation method like Moving average, FIFO, Standard. 

What's the major impact ? it is safe with multiple valuation method or suggest to follow single valuation method?   

Please advice on it. Thanks.

SAP Business One, SAP B1, SBO,  #Item master #Valuation Method

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Assistance Required: Restricting Receipt Stock Usage Before Production Order Closure -SAP B1 Busines
entry.content:
Dear All,

I need your assistance regarding the Production Order Receipt Stock.
My query is: How can we restrict sales users from using the receipt stock before the production order is closed as per the planned quantity?

Alternatively, is there a way to block this stock from being used until the production order is fully completed and closed?

Looking forward to your suggestions.

entry.title: FMS query for Line total
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

May I know if there is a way to query sum of Linetotal of sales order details in FMS, If we have a way to manipulate the data.

 

 

TIA,

entry.title: When adding AP Invoice "Reconciliation difference must be zero before reconciling [Message 3821-8]"
entry.content:
Hi All,

My AP Invoice is in draft mode, but when going to add the document, system is showing this error "Reconciliation difference must be zero before reconciling [Message 3821-8]"


Please assists do add the document.

entry.title: Query AR
entry.content:
The query below provides information on invoices that are due or due. The condition searches the PPS table (created by us) for the partner's branch and business, but we cannot apply this type of condition when the entry comes from a manual accounting entry or an entry on account in the accounts receivable module.

I would like to include in the query the condition that when U_Fast_CodPPS is not found, it will bring the information on the branch code registered in the document that was entered.

I would also like to know if you can suggest another way to bring the U_Fast_CodPPS information when the document information is not provided by an invoice?

 

WITH Depo AS (
    SELECT 
        "DocEntry", 
        MAX("WhsCode") AS "WhsCode" -- Select nas Linhas da OINV
    FROM 
        "INV1"
    GROUP BY 
        "DocEntry"
),
 
Dipo AS (
    SELECT 
        "DocEntry", 
        MAX("WhsCode") AS "WhsCode" -- Select nas linhasd da ODPI
    FROM 
        "DPI1"
    GROUP BY 
        "DocEntry"
),
 
Dpoi AS (
    SELECT 
        "DocEntry", 
        MAX("WhsCode") AS "WhsCode" -- Select nas linhas da ORIN
    FROM 
        "RIN1"
    GROUP BY 
        "DocEntry"
)
 
SELECT 
 
CASE 
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 13 THEN T8."U_Fast_CodPPS"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 14 THEN X0."U_Fast_CodPPS"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 203 THEN T9."U_Fast_CodPPS"
    END AS "Customer",
    T0."TransId" AS "Launch",
    CASE 
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 13 THEN T3."Serial"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 14 THEN T5."Serial"
    END AS "Invoice",
    T2."CardCode" AS "Customer SAP",
    T2."CardName" AS "Customer Name",
    CASE 
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 13 THEN T3."DocTotal"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 14 THEN T5."DocTotal"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 203 THEN T4."DocTotal"
    END AS "Original Amount",
    CASE 
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 13 THEN T3."TaxDate"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 14 THEN T5."TaxDate"
        WHEN T1."TransType" = 203 THEN T4."TaxDate"
    END AS "Doc Date",
    T1."DueDate" AS "Due Date",
    T1."Debit" - T1."Credit" AS "Invoice Value",
    T1."BalDueDeb" - T1."BalDueCred" AS "Open Balance",
    DAYS_BETWEEN(T1."DueDate", CURRENT_DATE) AS "Past Due Days"
    
 
FROM 
    "OJDT" T0
INNER JOIN 
    "JDT1" T1 ON T0."TransId" = T1."TransId" 
INNER JOIN 
    "OCRD" T2 ON T1."ShortName" = T2."CardCode"
LEFT JOIN 
    "OINV" T3 ON T0."CreatedBy" = T3."DocEntry"
LEFT JOIN 
    "ODPI" T4 ON T0."CreatedBy" = T4."DocEntry"
LEFT JOIN 
    "ORIN" T5 ON T0."CreatedBy" = T5."DocEntry"
    
    
LEFT JOIN 
    Depo ON T3."DocEntry" = Depo."DocEntry"    
LEFT JOIN 
    Dipo ON T4."DocEntry" = Dipo."DocEntry"  
LEFT JOIN 
    Dpoi ON T5."DocEntry" = Dpoi."DocEntry"  
    
    
    
LEFT JOIN 
    "@FAST_PPSF" T7 ON T1."ShortName" = T7."U_Fast_PN"
LEFT JOIN 
    "@FAST_PSF1" T8 ON T7."DocEntry" = T8."DocEntry" AND Depo."WhsCode" = T8."U_Fast_Filial"
LEFT JOIN 
    "@FAST_PSF1" T9 ON T7."DocEntry" = T9."DocEntry" AND Dipo."WhsCode" = T9."U_Fast_Filial"
LEFT JOIN 
    "@FAST_PSF1" X0 ON T7."DocEntry" = X0."DocEntry" AND Dpoi."WhsCode" = X0."U_Fast_Filial"
    
    
 
WHERE 
    ((T1."BalDueDeb" - T1."BalDueCred") <> 0) 
    AND T2."CardType" = 'C'
    --AND T0."TransId" IN (3950, 2651, 1180)

entry.title: SAP Business One Integration Framework - Exchange Rates
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,
Hope you're doing well.

I'm implementing in one of the clients the exchange rates package of SAP B1 Integration Framework.

I have done all the configurations and i'm connecting sucessfully with ECB webservice.
This is my parameter mapping (followed the documentation of the scenario) :

And this is my preview XML:

Altough everything seems ok, when integrating with sap business one I got this message:

By the documentation this error could be related with missing ISO codes, wich I fullfilled in the Database:

Can anyone help me finding what i'm doing wrong ?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
Tiago Gonçalves

entry.title: Unable to find checkbox Without Qty Posting under A/R Invoice form in SAP Business One 10.0
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am unable to find the checkbox Without Qty Posting under A/R Invoice form (in Item row in Contents tab) while choosing Transaction Type as GST Debit Memo in SAP Business One 10.0. Could someone suggest how to make it appear in Item row?

entry.title: SAP B1 – Default Contact Name for New Business Partners
entry.content:
Is it possible to have a predefined default name automatically created in the "Contact Persons" tab for every new Business Partner record?

 

Thanks, Maurício.

entry.title: Service call module update date and create time into UTC format of MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss query
entry.content:
Hello experts.

I am needing to get the service call module update date & time (table OSCL) into a single column in the format of 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss' and then have it converted to UTC. Ultimately, I will be using this query in a Boyum P&D Report Action. I have seen posts before (but cannot find now) where the SQL function STUFF() was used but I know that each of those examples were for marketing document tables. Please direct me to those posts if I am mistaken.

The OSCL table does not record time with seconds, therefore the max number in characters/numbers in the time fields will be 4 (i.e., 1344 for 13:44, instead of ORDR's 134423 for 13:44:23).

I am able to perform the query below in MS SQL as well as the SAP B1 query editor when the time field has at least 3 characters (e.g., on or after 1am) but the FORMAT function fails when it is less than 3.

Is possible to query for the update date & time (or the create date & time) into a single column without having to perform a case statement to evaluate the length of time field (which could be from 1 - 4 characters long [2 for 00:02 and 932 for 09:32 and 1748 for 17:48])? 

FORMAT(CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), OSCL.UpdateDate, 101)+' '+FORMAT(OSCL.UpdateTime, '##:##')) AT TIME ZONE 'Eastern Standard Time' AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss')

 Thank you in advance for any assistance you can provide.

entry.title: BoM using 3rd party during manufacturing process
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I would be interested in hearing your solutions for an issue we have?

We have a BoM established which requires a 3rd party to perform a service as part of the manufacturing process.

Example:

Step 1. Raw steel frames are manufactured (with complete BoM)

Step 2. This is sent to Galvanisers to perform a service.

Step 3. Galvanised product is returned for completion of final stage of manufacturing. (BoM)

How would you capture the complete cost of the manufactured product (BoM for raw steel frame, plus galvanising, plus finishing BoM)?

Thank you all very much for your support

entry.title: UDF in Expanded SC not showing all to a specific superuser
entry.content: In SAP Business One 10.0, Profit and Loss Statement - Selection Criteria > Expanded > User-Defined Fields, not all UDFs are not showing a specific user even if the user is a super user and have professional license. It is a unique case when all superuser can view all. Please help me troubleshoot it. Thank you

entry.title: HSN Code wise report SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear all,

I need a query based report which gives output HSN wise summary report. 

HSNCode, Docentry with fields HSNCode , BaseAmt , IGSTAmt , SGSTAmt , CGStAmt, Tax %

Report include two document : AR Invoice and AR Credit note

SAP Business One #HSN #SAP B1

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Cross tab sums different when summing the same field via insert summary
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am having this issue where a value in a cross tab is not summing up a formula field correctly. 

 

Cross tab sum is giving these values

It should actually be these values 

I double checked all the fields, and the formula field adds up correctly when inserting a summary. I did this to check. Any ideas where the summing could be going wrong. The formula field for the crosstab has if statements, but even if I remove all and just leave the relevant one to the data I am testing, it is giving two different amounts. 

Thanks all,
Jerusha

entry.title: Vendor Refund for AP Down Payment – Best Practice in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We are looking for guidance on how to handle the following scenario in SAP Business One:

An AP Down Payment Invoice was processed, and an Outgoing Payment was made to the vendor. Later, the vendor refunded the amount (either partially or fully).

As the down payment is already closed due to the outgoing payment, we are unable to generate an AP Credit Memo against it. This is blocking us from properly reflecting the vendor refund in the system.

What is the recommended way to handle such a vendor refund in SAP Business One?

Any guidance or shared experiences would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Need to run system status report multiple times in order to use the support user.
entry.content:
Hi All,
We have a few companies are using the Support user in all of them. Initially, we had to run the System Status Report in RSP before we could log into the companies. RSP was running weekly, but still had to run the SSR for each company individually and upload it before we could log in the companies.

The SSR in RSP runs weekly, last one ran on 04/06/2025. Today when I had to log into the various companies, I had to run the SSR again before I could log into each company. 
Is it suppose to work like this. Had anyone experienced this as well.

We are on version 10.0 FP2208
RSP: 3.2 PL19

Thank you all,
Jerusha

entry.title: Text Field with more than characters
entry.content: In standard sap business one forms, the text field or any udf fields does not allow more than 255 characters. But my clients requires in marketing documents like P0 ,a field that they can use for terms and condition which is more than 255 chars. How can I achieve it please.
